languages.text: {n}Вы подныриваете под удар, и лезвие рассекает кожу и мышцы на лопатке. Адреналин в крови и жажда победы, заставляют тело игнорировать боль и слабость от яда.{/n}

{n}You duck under the strike, and the blade cuts through skin and muscle on your shoulder blade. Driven by adrenaline and a thirst for victory, your body shrugs off the pain and the weakness of the poison.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы подныриваете под удар, и лезвие рассекает кожу и мышцы на лопатке. Адреналин в крови и жажда победы, заставляют тело игнорировать боль и слабость от яда.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}You duck under the blow, and the blade cuts through the skin and muscle on your shoulder blade. Driven by adrenaline and a thirst for victory, your body shrugs off the pain and the weakness of the poison.{/n}

{n}You duck under the strike, and the blade cuts through skin and muscle on your shoulder blade. Driven by adrenaline and a thirst for victory, your body shrugs off the pain and the weakness of the poison.{/n}

{n}You duck under the blow, and the blade cuts through the skin and muscle on your shoulder blade. But the adrenaline in your blood and your thirst for victory dull the agony and allow you to ignore the wound.{/n}

{n}You duck under the blow, and the blade cuts through the skin and muscle on your shoulder blade. Driven by adrenaline and a thirst for victory, your body shrugs off the pain and the weakness of the poison.{/n}

languages.text: {n}相手の攻撃をかわし、肩甲骨の皮膚と筋肉を斬り裂かれた。しかし、血中のアドレナリンと勝利への渇望が痛みを鈍らせ、傷を無視させている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You duck under the blow, and the blade cuts through the skin and muscle on your shoulder blade. But the adrenaline in your blood and your thirst for victory dull the agony and allow you to ignore the wound.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 相手の攻撃をかわし、肩甲骨の皮膚と筋肉を斬り裂かれた。しかし、血中のアドレナリンと勝利への渇望が痛みを鈍らせ、傷を無視させている。

languages.text: {n}Vous vous baissez sous le bras tendu du colonel, dont le couteau entaille votre omoplate jusqu'au muscle. Mais mû par l'adrénaline et la soif de victoire, votre corps passe outre la douleur et ce piètre poison.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You duck under the strike, and the blade cuts through skin and muscle on your shoulder blade. Driven by adrenaline and a thirst for victory, your body shrugs off the pain and the weakness of the poison.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous vous baissez sous le bras tendu du colonel, dont le couteau entaille votre omoplate jusqu'au muscle. Mais mû par l'adrénaline et la soif de victoire, votre corps passe outre la douleur et ce piètre poison.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eğilerek darbeden kaçınmaya çalışıyorsun. Bıçak, kürek kemiğinin deriyi ve kası kesiyor. Adrenalin ve zafer susuzluğuyla hareket eden bedenin, acıyı ve zehrin verdiği zayıflığı umursamıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You duck under the strike, and the blade cuts through skin and muscle on your shoulder blade. Driven by adrenaline and a thirst for victory, your body shrugs off the pain and the weakness of the poison.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eğilerek darbeden kaçınmaya çalışıyorsun. Bıçak, kürek kemiğinin deriyi ve kası kesiyor. Adrenalin ve zafer susuzluğuyla hareket eden bedenin, acıyı ve zehrin verdiği zayıflığı umursamıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du duckst dich unter dem Hieb weg und die Klinge durchschneidet die Haut und Muskeln deines Schulterblattes. Getrieben von Adrenalin und dem Wunsch, zu siegen, streift dein Körper den Schmerz und die Wirkung des Giftes ab.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You duck under the strike, and the blade cuts through skin and muscle on your shoulder blade. Driven by adrenaline and a thirst for victory, your body shrugs off the pain and the weakness of the poison.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du duckst dich unter dem Hieb weg und die Klinge durchschneidet die Haut und Muskeln deines Schulterblattes. Getrieben von Adrenalin und dem Wunsch, zu siegen, streift dein Körper den Schmerz und die Wirkung des Giftes ab.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Te agachas bajo su ataque y el filo de su cuchillo corta la piel y el músculo de tu hombro. Con el impulso de la adrenalina y la sed de victoria, tu cuerpo ignora el dolor y la debilidad del veneno.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You duck under the strike, and the blade cuts through skin and muscle on your shoulder blade. Driven by adrenaline and a thirst for victory, your body shrugs off the pain and the weakness of the poison.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Te agachas bajo su ataque y el filo de su cuchillo corta la piel y el músculo de tu hombro. Con el impulso de la adrenalina y la sed de victoria, tu cuerpo ignora el dolor y la debilidad del veneno.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你俯身闪避了这一击，刀刃却还是划开了肩胛处的皮肉。在肾上腺素和对胜利的渴望的驱使下，你的身体扛住了疼痛和毒素带来的虚弱。{/n}
